meaning: n.孤独的人,不合群的动物
examples: In school I was a loner. I went my own way.
He was a loner by nature and by inclination.
He was a paradox—a loner who loved to chat to strangers.
He appears to be a loner and conspiracy theorist of a vaguely right-wing variety.
Andrew, the shy loner, finds that chronicling his life with a camcorder is opening his world.
